creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: adamw
Date: Sun May 27 14:37:20 UTC 2018
New revision: 470984
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/470984

Log:
  Update to 3.0.1 and take maintainership

  The license has changed from Apache 2.0 to Boost Software License.

  I'm taking maintainership as this port has been outdated for two
  years with no maintainer input.

  PR:		228217
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (2 weeks)

Changes:
  head/devel/msgpack/Makefile
  head/devel/msgpack/distinfo
  head/devel/msgpack/pkg-descr
  head/devel/msgpack/pkg-plist
